hero.headline:
CREATIVE
DEVELOPER
hero.description: Designing visual systems in motion. Blending cinematic craft with intelligent interaction to shape immersive digital experiences.

about.label: ABOUT DANIEL
about.headline: CREATIVE DEVELOPER IN MOTION
about.body: I build visual systems that connect motion graphics, interactive code, and early ML experiments. The focus is always on translating abstract ideas into precise, cinematic experiences.

projects.name: Dynamic Interface Flow
projects.description: An abstract motion piece visualizing modern UI interfaces with geometric precision and playful animations. Perfect for hero headers and background motion.
projects.subtitle: Abstract motion piece visualizing modern UI interfaces with geometric precision and playful animations.
projects.details: Perfect for hero headers and background motion. Demonstrates mastery of timing, spatial organization, and turning static UI concepts into dynamic storytelling.

projects.name: BirdCLEF Audio Recognition
projects.description: An advanced deep learning pipeline designed to identify avian vocalizations in complex soundscapes. Utilizing Mel-spectrogram conversion and CNN architectures to monitor biodiversity through bioacoustic data.

projects.name: BipedalWalker RL Training
projects.description: Training a bipedal robot to walk and navigate terrain using Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO). This project explores the balance between exploration and exploitation in continuous action spaces, resulting in a robust locomotive agent after 1 million timesteps of training.
projects.tools: PYTHON / PYTORCH / OPENAI GYM / PPO ALGORITHM / STABLE BASELINES3

projects.name: Portfolio Studio 2.0
projects.description: The architectural core of my digital presence. A high-performance portfolio crafted with Next.js, featuring smooth state transitions, custom-built UI components, and integrated 3D elements. Designed to bridge the gap between motion design and functional web engineering.
projects.tools: NEXT.JS / REACT / THREE.JS / TAILWIND CSS / FRAMER MOTION

projects.name: ALPHA-MATH: Logic-Transplanted Reasoning Agent
projects.description: A specialized reasoning agent designed for IMO-level mathematical problem solving. ALPHA-MATH combines surgical logic distillation from 70B models into lightweight 8B architectures, integrated with a "System 2" Pythonic execution loop for self-correction and symbolic verification.

projects.name: The Science of Motion
projects.description: An exploration of motion theory focusing on the contrast between fluid and rigid movements. This project demonstrates mastery over the Graph Editor to create distinct physical personalities for simple geometric forms.

projects.name: Character & Form
projects.description: A collection of narrative-driven pieces that blend 2D character animation with varied visual styles. Focuses on seamless transitions (Match Cuts) and integrating animated elements into real-world plates to tell a compelling story.

projects.name: Physics & Precision
projects.description: Showcasing technical precision in simulating physical environments and timing-critical interactions. From 3D Rube Goldberg machines to high-speed kinetic chases, this project highlights the intersection of logic and movement.

projects.name: Animation Bootcamp
projects.description: A deep dive into the 12 principles of animation through the School of Motion curriculum. This series focuses on mastering the Graph Editor to transition from linear, mechanical movement to expressive, physically-accurate motion.

projects.name: Complex Systems
projects.description: Focusing on the 'Motion Methods' workflow from School of Motion. This project transitions from simple movement to sophisticated motion systems, emphasizing design-driven animation and complex project architecture.
